title: selaginella finium
intro: Selaginella finium, also known as the "resurrection fern," is a type of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella finium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
